options.name: --loader
options.description: Enter a schema loader type between those values [RawJson | Swagger | OpenApi | GraphQl | RawXml]

options.name: --duplicates
options.description: Enter a template duplication handling strategy between those values [Throw | KeepLast | KeepFirst]

options.name: --source
options.description: Enter a path (relative or absolute) to an source document.

options.name: --auth
options.description: Enter an authorization token to access source documents

options.name: --output
options.description: Enter the path (relative or absolute) to the output path (content will be overritten)

options.name: --template
options.description: Enter a path (relative or absolute / file or folder) to a template.

options.name: --intermediate
options.description: Enter a path (relative or absolute) to a file for intermediate 'all refs merged' output of the json document

options.name: --customhelpers
options.description: Enter a path (relative or absolute) to a folder with a custom helpers project (.csproj)

options.name: --artifacts
options.description: Enter a path (relative or absolute) where the custom helpers builds process can output artifacts (default ./temp)
